title: Luffy Finds the Conspirators
description: On pages 13–16, luffy finds the conspirators as the hidden Baroque Works agents expose their role in breaking the giants’ duel and begin turning the Straw Hats into targets.
scene: Luffy Finds the Conspirators. The hidden Baroque Works agents expose their role in breaking the giants’ duel and begin turning the Straw Hats into targets. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Ah, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Thank God you're here. What're you doing here anyways?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Lu...

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Ah-

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Kyaa- AAA!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Nami?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Nami!? Nami!?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Oh shi...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Luffy- Yymy- yyy!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: trip!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Nami was eaten by a dinosaur!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: For real!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: We were both running away from the dinosaur in the jungle but she disappeared all of a sudden...!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: What do I do!? I just let our crewmate die!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: W-Wait, wait, wait just a minute here...!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: You said she ASAP- peared all of a sudden,

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: But did you actually go back to see if she was eaten!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: As if I COULD! I was scared outta my wits!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: If not a dinosaur, then she must've been eaten by some other wild beast!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: I can't say this for certain, but...

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: If Baroque works' agents have failed us to this island,

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: It would make sense for them to have only attacked Nami.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: After all, you're probably not on their hit list...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: And even that barrel of rum... perhaps it was originally meant to kill us...!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Rum? What about the rum?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: What!? It exploded inside his stomach!?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: So then... He went to go fight even with his injuries!?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: But those two have been fighting for a hundred years! They always fight at full power and they've still yet to decide a victor!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It's... Probably the most intense fight for personal pride and honour in the world!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Yeah.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Their fight can't possibly end in this way!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on luffy finds the conspirators. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
